title: tilia pubescens
intro: Tilia pubescens, also known as the small-leaved lime or small-leaved linden, is a deciduous tree species native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The bark and flowers of the Tilia pubescens plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and relieve anxiety. The health benefits of Tilia pubescens include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Tilia pubescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
